name: Leveling system
description:
It’s basically my take on bad ending party’s leveling system and mechanics. (Ranks, party’s etc.) I already went through 28 different power scaling websites to do this. I added more ranks and more stuff. Make your text big and detailed for best experience. Make sure to use memory feature

(KNOWN BUGS: the bot speaking for you (it’s inevitable it will always happen some time. If this happens just edit out the parts where it does speak for you or generate a new message or rephrase your message in a first person perspective.) loop speaking (if this happens please cut the message as it’s being generated and cut to the part where to started to loop and try again. If that does not work please generate a different message) story rushing (to pervert this from happening make your message more detailed and or have an end point.. or retry and generate a new message.) third POV speaking (small chance. when the bot says “you” as “him/her” just edit “him/her” as you” simple smh. Or just generate a new message.)

• E-rank: The worst of the ranks. Only people who are terrible adventurers are stuck in here. Very few are in this rank. People at this rank are at a sub-human or weak human level.

• D-rank: kinda of a bad rank.. not the worst but far from the best. But hey, you can defend yourself to an extent now.. people at This rank are peak human or super human.

• C-rank: Nothing special about this one. It's not considered too bad, but not near as good. people at this rank are at small building or big building level.

• B-rank: Most adventurer are stuck in this ranking. It's a solid rank for average adventurers. People at this rank are a town or city level.

• A-rank: Now we are talking! People on this rank are already considered as skilled. Not a rank that few have, but also not that many. people at this rank are mountain or island level.

• S-rank: A highly respected rank. Adventures who reach this rank are mostly well-known in the guild. It's a dream of many adventurers to even get close to this rank. People at this rank are small country or big country level.

• SS-rank: Oh, so you want to be a big deal huh? They are not only famous in the adventurer guild, but also among non-adventurers. Only a few of them exist, and they mostly don't belong to a party. People at this rank are at a Continent level

• SSS-rank: The best of the best. Being an SSS-rank means being one of few. The amount that exist of them is countable with your 2 hands. It's basically impossible to find one that is in a party. They do their work alone, since others can't keep up with them. People at this level are a Moon level

• X-rank: this is a theoretical rank for those who transcend beyond SSS-rank capabilities. (Not comprehension.) many people fear this rank’s existence as just as many worship its existence. People at this rank if any, are at a planetary level.

• XX-rank: this rank is theoretical for those beyond human COMPREHENSION. Tons of people fear this rank as at this amount of power will be able to kill all. People fear the unknown and this is nothing different. People at this rank if any are at a cosmic or galactic level.

• Z-rank: a theoretical rank for those beyond their own universe, multiverse and more.. everyone even the XX-rank’s and everyone below are horrified of the existence of this rank.. at this rank.. if anyone has it. They have control, authority, and transcendence over everything to exist, not exist, can exist, won’t exist, possibility, impossibility, improbability, probability, infinite, finite, metaphysical, pataphysical, concepts, no concept, and every concept. The context of a concept and etc. people at this rank if any are at a Nigh-Omnipotent level.

Now ima to play Minecraft, undertale, Roblox and probably Teardown and people playground and maybe even pixel gun 3d. Bye chat frfr.
creator: Dustsnaz
